title: Apify
description: Exposes Apify Actors as agent tools.
Provides run_actor (run an Actor and return its dataset) and get_dataset_items.

tool_apify.max_items.title: Max Items
tool_apify.max_items.description: Upper cap on items returned per call (agent requests are clamped to this).

tool_apify.run_timeout_secs.title: Run Timeout (seconds)
tool_apify.run_timeout_secs.description: Max seconds an Actor run may take before it is stopped.

tool_apify.max_cost_usd.title: Max Cost (USD)
tool_apify.max_cost_usd.description: Spend limit per run for pay-per-event Actors.
